zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley於1331年8月10日出生在英國斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅時，他的父親Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley22歲，母親Margaret21歲。他於1349年10月19日與Elizabeth Stafford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1367年4月2日在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley于1331年8月10日出生在英国斯塔福爾哈特利 霍爾梅时，他的父亲Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley22岁，母亲Margaret21岁。他于1349年10月19日与Elizabeth Stafford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1367年4月2日在西班牙拉 利奧亞納拉享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾梅列瓦列。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ferrers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire (Eure) and Ferrières (Manche).

variants.name: Ferris
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened Anglicized form of Irish Ó Fearghuis or Ó Fearghasa ‘descendant of Fearghus’, or from the Scottish-Gaelic form of this personal name, Fearghus (see Fergus ).
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ferrières-Saint-Hilaire, Eure and Ferrières, La Manche in Normandy, France.

variants.name: Ferridge
meanings: English: unexplained; possibly a form of Ferris and therefore a variant of Ferrers .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley was born on 10 August 1331, in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley, was 22 and his mother, Margaret, was 21. He married Elizabeth Stafford on 19 October 1349. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 2 April 1367, in Nájera, La Rioja, Spain, at the age of 35, and was buried in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley est né le 10 août 1331, à Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stafford le 19 octobre 1349. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 2 avril 1367, à Nájera, La Rioja, Espagne, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Merevale, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England: Chartley Castle, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley am 10. August 1331 in Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley 22 und seine Mutter Margaret 21. Er hat am 19. Oktober 1349 Elizabeth Stafford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 2. April 1367 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Nájera, La Rioja, Spanien und wurde in Merevale, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley è nato il il 10 agosto 1331 nel Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Stafford il 19 ottobre 1349. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 2 aprile 1367, nel Nájera, La Rioja, Spagna, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Merevale, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartleyが1331年8月10日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアチャートリー ホールメで生まれた時，父Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartleyは22歳，母Margaretは21歳であった。1349年10月19日にElizabeth Staffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1367年4月2日にスペインラ リオジャンaジャーアで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアメレベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley(이)가 1331년 8월 10일 영국 스태퍼드실르 처틀리 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1349년 10월 19일 Elizabeth Stafford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1367년 4월 2일 스페인 라 리오자 aj라에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 머에발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley nasceu em 10 de agosto de 1331, em Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stafford em 19 de outubro de 1349. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 2 de abril de 1367, em Nájera, La Rioja, Espanha, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley родился 10 августа 1331 г. в местности чартли холм, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stafford 19 октября 1349 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 2 апреля 1367 г. в местности нaджира, ла риоджа, Испания в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности миревеил, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Ferrers 4th Baron Ferrers of Chartley nació el 10 de agosto de 1331, en Chartley Holme, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ferrers 3rd Lord Ferrers of Chartley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Stafford el 19 de octubre de 1349. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 2 de abril de 1367, en Nájera, La Rioja, España, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Merevale, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
